Signature: Brief sessions (4.9 min), minimal depth (8.3%), high save actions (6.6). Varied devices, all time blocks. Users collect content for later.
Strategy: Offline access, queue management, push notifications for saved content
Risk: Platform treated as discovery tool only; consumption happens elsewhere

Signature: Many pieces (14.6), very low depth (11.8%), high diversity (6.9), frequent pauses (2.5). Mobile-dominant, afternoon/evening peak.
Strategy: Curated discovery feeds, topic bundles, social sharing features
Risk: May never convert to deep engagement; suits ad-supported tier

Signature: Long sessions (52.2 min), near-complete depth (91.3%), high interactions (9.5), low diversity (1.5). Desktop-dominant, daytime hours.
Strategy: Premium long-form content, sequential playlists, loyalty rewards
Risk: Churn if content quality declines; high expectations

Signature: Short sessions (11.1 min), moderate depth (47.5%), mobile-exclusive. Sporadic timing across evening, late night, and morning.
Strategy: Short-form mobile UX, seamless session resumption, micro-playlists
Risk: Session abandonment if UX friction exists; needs instant loading
